text: Two elves in red suits chat while holding cups. They stand in front of shelves with toys.
Buddy peeks through small gap in wooden wall, eyes wide.
"Buddy's head disappears behind wood as he listens"
original_texts: Buddy peeks through small gap in wooden wall, eyes wide.
Buddy's head disappears behind wood as he listens.

text: Buddy looks around with wide eyes.
An elf wearing orange clothes is fiting a small elf shoes into Buddy's big feet.
Buddy stands tall in small tub, struggling to get water on him.

original_texts: Buddy turns head sharply. Surprise crosses face.
Buddy leans forward in tub. He speaks to self softly.

text: Buddy lies in small bed, then springs up. Buddy falls off bed onto floor.
original_texts: Buddy lies in small bed, then springs up.
Buddy falls off bed onto floor.

text: Buddy stands in old photo with tiny elves. Frame shakes slightly.
"Buddy are in a photo playing basketball with tiny elves. He stares at clown toy shocked."
original_texts: Buddy holds photo with tiny elves. He stares at clown toy. Buddy looks shocked.

text: Orange-clad elf turns to face Buddy.
original_texts: Orange-clad elf turns to face Buddy. He speaks while gesturing with hands.
Blue-capped elf works on teddy bears. He sits at table, focused on task.

text: Buddy falls down onto the orange-clad elf.
